allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs={p[''''name'''']:p[''''version''''] for p in d.get\(''''packages'''',[]\)}; print\(''''analyzer:'''', pkgs.get\(''''analyzer'''',''''?''''\)\); print\(''''analyzer_plugin:'''', pkgs.get\(''''analyzer_plugin'''',''''?''''\)\); print\(''''build_runner:'''', pkgs.get\(''''build_runner'''',''''?''''\)\); print\(''''drift_dev:'''', pkgs.get\(''''drift_dev'''',''''?''''\)\); print\(''''freezed:'''', pkgs.get\(''''freezed'''',''''?''''\)\)")
